name: research_ethics_ransomware_incident_forces_lumen_jus_mer
premise: An internal crisis team convened after contradictory signals hit leadership from operations, legal, and external partners at once. In Research Ethics, the situation tagged internally around research ethics ransomware incident forces lumen jus mer has converged with local pressure in the Redwood Bay corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Two executives have pre-committed to opposite remedies in side channels; whichever memo lands first will box everyone in. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. The trade is not abstract: it is justice versus mercy under incomplete information, and whichever value you deprioritize will have defenders who are technically correct about the risk they fear.

agents.name: Camila Nowak
agents.identity: I am Camila Nowak, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Research Ethics. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat mercy as disposable collateral every time justice spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Kaito Kim
agents.identity: I am Kaito Kim, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Research Ethics. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so justice cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes mercy in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will redirect resources to the smallest cohort first where harm is most concentrated, documenting tradeoffs openly—privileging fairness dimensions of mercy.
I will optimize for aggregate harm reduction across the whole population immediately—privileging the utilitarian reading of justice even where distribution gets rough.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Camila Nowak must choose under justice versus mercy. What does Camila Nowak do?
